| Ambassador Atom | |
| A color cover page of *Ambassador Atom* | |
| アトム大使 (*Atomu Taishi*) | |
| Genre | [Adventure](/wiki/Adventure_fiction "Adventure fiction"), [science fiction](/wiki/Science_fiction "Science fiction"), [humor](/wiki/Humor "Humor") |
| Manga | |
| Written by | Osamu Tezuka |
| Magazine | *Shōnen* |
| Original run | April 1951 – March 1952 |

***Ambassador Atom***  (アトム大使, *Atomu Taishi*) is a manga short series written by [Osamu Tezuka](/wiki/Osamu_Tezuka "Osamu Tezuka"). It was originally serialized in [Kobunsha](/wiki/Kobunsha "Kobunsha")'s *Shōnen* magazine from 1951 to 1952.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The series is mostly noted for introducing the character [Astro Boy](/wiki/Astro_Boy_(character) "Astro Boy (character)").[[2]](#cite_note-2) The series would be released as Chapter 0 in the original *[Astro Boy](/wiki/Astro_Boy "Astro Boy")* *[tankōbon](/wiki/Tank%C5%8Dbon "Tankōbon")* volumes published by [Kodansha](/wiki/Kodansha "Kodansha").
